_description: SonarQube stack — base images of the wrapper/backup builds plus the images the compose files pull. A digest move triggers a rebuild/release.

images.name: sonarqube
images.description: SonarQube Community Build — base of the wrapper image (pinned; bump with the branch plugin, see docs/upgrade.md)

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Base image for the sonarqube-backup container (src/sonarqube-backup/Dockerfile)

images.name: postgres
images.description: PostgreSQL database (pulled by the compose files)

images.name: busybox
images.description: Kernel-init sidecar that sets vm.max_map_count (pulled by the compose files)
